title: [F] Protect file with password
author: mcordoba
body:
## 🚀 Feature Proposal

It would be useful the possibility to protect the file with a password as you can do already on excel files.

## Motivation

It is useful for excels with personal data that must be protected.

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @mcordoba Is it possible to set password encryption when directing out excel?

comments.author: mcordoba
comments.body:
I mean an excel password and not a zip password or similar as once decompressed the file may be saved on hard disk without protection while with an excel password the file is always protected.

I don't know how to achieve this with the output data. Any idea?

comments.author: rajeev-ayer
comments.body:
This feature would be very useful for my project as well.  Any more news on this feature?  Is there a plan to implement this in the near future?

My motivation is the same as stated by @mcordoba.
